sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30501" key="e)/gkwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔγκων</orth>, coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγκών</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.47</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
